body:
Fixes #10

## Summary
- Removed the unused demo composer Preview control.
- Added prefilled GitHub issue links on every assistant dialog and in the header, including transcript history, version, browser, worker, mode, diagnostics, and timestamp metadata.
- Added a symbolic `identity` response for “Who are you?” style prompts across the Rust engine, WASM worker, JavaScript fallback, and seed data.
- Added the Issue 10 case study folder with raw issue/PR/reference data and regression analysis.

## Reproduction
Before this change, the new regression tests showed that `Who are you?` returned the unknown fallback, assistant messages had no report action, and the Preview control was still present beside Send.

## Verification
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `cargo test`
- `node --check docs/demo/app.js`
- `node --check docs/demo/formal_ai_worker.js`
- `npm run test:local` from `tests/e2e`
- Playwright browser smoke test at `http://localhost:3457/`

## Screenshot
![Issue 10 demo UI](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-10-528ad8299bfa/docs/screenshots/issue-10-demo-ui.png?raw=true)
